name: mountly
description: On-demand interactive UI platform. Use your React/Vue/Svelte components with no new component model, modernize legacy pages incrementally, and load rich UI only when users need it.

scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.test:stories: pnpm run test:unit && PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OPEN=never playwright test "tests/.*\\.story\\.spec\\.ts"
scripts.test:examples: env -u NO_COLOR PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OPEN=never playwright test tests/examples-hosts.spec.ts tests/vite-host-remotes-url.spec.ts tests/mcp-demo-preview.story.spec.ts tests/docs-happy-path.story.spec.ts
scripts.test:cli: env -u NO_COLOR PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OPEN=never playwright test tests/cli.spec.ts
scripts.test:consumer: env -u NO_COLOR PLAYWRIGHT_HTML_OPEN=never playwright test tests/npm-consumer.spec.ts
scripts.test:dx: pnpm run test:cli && pnpm run test:consumer && pnpm run test:examples
scripts.quality: vp check && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.test:mcp:verify: pnpm run test:mcp:unit && pnpm run test:mcp:e2e
